## Quality checks
- [ ] Official links are preferred when available.
- [ ] “Why engineers care” is included for new resources.
- [ ] Caveats or validation limits are included when relevant.
- [ ] The entry is not just generic visual 3D generation.
- [ ] Internal Markdown links still resolve.
